Customer.ioAutomate Messaging Everywhere — Startups Get 12 Months Free

Promoted

Masaki Iino [...] Hi Product Hunt! 👋 I’m Masaki, an indie developer behind Toybird Labs. I built Pocket Screen because I often work on a single Mac display and kept losing focus while switching between a document, browser, chat, and the app I was actually working in. Pocket Screen turns the current frontmost window into a compact, always-on-top PiP-style window. You can keep a document beside your writing, watch a tutorial while following along, monitor chat, or reference a dashboard without constantly changing windows. It is controlled from the menu bar or a global shortcut, and the floating window can be moved, resized, adjusted for opacity, or made click-through. Captured content is displayed locally and is not uploaded. The app is free to try with 10-minute sessions, with a one-time in-app purchase for [...] 10-minute sessions, with a one-time in-app purchase for unlimited use. I’d love to hear how you use it and what would make it more useful in your daily workflow. Thanks for checking it out!

results.title: Pocket: Get right to the good stuff | Product Hunt
results.content:
View all

4.8

Based on 9 reviews

Review Pocket?

Pocket is highly praised for its simplicity and functionality, with users appreciating its ability to save and organize content for later reading. Makers of Cubox admire Pocket's original concept and simplicity. Users find it indispensable for managing information overload, with features like offline saving, categorization, and cross-device access enhancing its utility. The Chrome extension and mobile sharing options are highlighted for ease of use. Some users desire improved search functionality and integration with other cloud services. Overall, Pocket is valued for its efficiency in managing reading material.

content organization(2)

•12 reviews [...] Pros

content organization(2)

•12 reviews

Pocket is an indispensable tool for me as a copywriter. It allows me to quickly save interesting articles, blogs, and resources from the Internet that can serve as inspiration for my creativity or research for projects. Thanks to its user-friendly interface and the ability to organize saved content into various categories, I easily find the information I need when I need it. Moreover, the ability to access saved materials at any time and on any device makes Pocket an invaluable assistant in my daily work
